honors_college.activity_requirement: One honors activity each fall and spring term
honors_college.fellows: Each student assigned a Faculty Fellow starting sophomore year
honors_college.application: Via Common Application First Year Supplement (first-year) or online application (continuing/transfer). Requires two essays.

graduate_college.assistantship_enrollment: At least 8 credit hours per fall/spring while on assistantship
graduate_college.tuition_waiver: For 25%-67% appointments. Full-time waiver requires 9+ hours.
graduate_college.thesis_committee: Master's: 3+ members. Doctoral: 5+ members including one from outside program.
graduate_college.accessibility_requirement: Spring 2026+: All theses/dissertations must comply with WCAG 2.1 Level AA

professional_schools.name: UIC Law
professional_schools.support: Academic Achievement and Bar Preparation: advising, study skills, bar prep

professional_schools.name: College of Medicine
professional_schools.support: Academic support, career development, health/wellness, financial aid guidance

professional_schools.name: College of Dentistry
professional_schools.support: Resilience Center: therapy, support groups, referrals

professional_schools.name: Retzky College of Pharmacy
professional_schools.support: Academic counseling, accommodations, wellness, career services

veterans.benefits: G.I. Bill, Montgomery, Post 9/11, Chapters 1606 and 1607, Veterans Readiness and Employment

commuter.lockers: 300+ free semester lockers. Limited weekly lockers (emptied Fridays at 4pm).
commuter.lounge: Tables, armchairs, sofas, free portable charger rentals.

adult_learners.program: Adult Learners Professional and Leadership Development (for students 25+)

bridge_programs: AHS Summer Exploration and Transition Program

academic_recovery.program: Summer Edge — tuition-free program to address DFW bottlenecks via summer course retakes
